summary: Added tagSimplicityFinding() helper in flows.mjs and wired it into the build-verify dedicated simplicity pass in run.mjs so critical simplicity findings now appear as [simplicity veto] in both lastFailure and console output. Multi-review flow already tagged via mergeReviewFindings, so simplicity 🔴 → [simplicity veto] is now consistent across both flows. Added 4 new tests covering the helper and cross-flow contract; full suite 596/596 green.
